---
title: "Figure 5A-C. A core set of human milk components may constitute a conserved signature of mammary gland function"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Show code if file is knit 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Sets working directory to file location
library(rstudioapi)
if (interactive() && rstudioapi::isAvailable()) { 
  rootdir = dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path) 
  setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)) 
}
```

# Load data, libraries, functions
``` {r}
# Load libraries and data 
source("plotting_setup.R")
# Load functions
source("plotting_functions.R")
```

# Figure 5

## Figure 5A
``` {r}
# Load Figure 4-specific data 
enrichment_df_path = "C://Users/ETTINA03/NYU Langone Health Dropbox/April Jauhal/Shenhav_Lab/Databases/Tissue_Atlas/processed_tissue_enrichment.csv"
enrichment_df = read.csv(enrichment_df_path, row.names = 1)
enrichment_df_filt = enrichment_df %>% filter(p_val_perc_adjust < 0.05)
Breast_glandular_expr_genes = enrichment_df_filt %>% filter(Top_cell_type=="Breast glandular cells") %>% pull(Gene.name)
Breast_myoepitheilal_expr_genes = enrichment_df_filt %>% filter(Top_cell_type=="Breast myoepithelial cells") %>% pull(Gene.name)
Immune_cell_types = c("B-cells", "Hofbauer cells", "Macrophages", "monocytes", "dendritic cells", "NK-cells", "Plasma cells", "granulocytes", "Kupffer cells", "Langerhans cells", "T-cells") 
Immune_expr_genes = enrichment_df_filt %>% filter(Top_cell_type %in% Immune_cell_types) %>% pull(Gene.name)
IG_genes = read.delim("C:/Users/ETTINA03/NYU Langone Health Dropbox/April Jauhal/Shenhav_Lab/Databases/Tissue_Atlas/Secretome/protein_class_Immunoglobulin.tsv") %>% pull(Gene)
blood_secrete_genes = read.delim("C:/Users/ETTINA03/NYU Langone Health Dropbox/April Jauhal/Shenhav_Lab/Databases/Tissue_Atlas/Secretome/sa_location_Secreted_to_blood.tsv") %>% pull(Gene)
female_secrete_genes = read.delim("C:/Users/ETTINA03/NYU Langone Health Dropbox/April Jauhal/Shenhav_Lab/Databases/Tissue_Atlas/Secretome/sa_location_Secreted_to_female-reproductive-system.tsv") %>% pull(Gene)
ECM_secrete_genes = read.delim("C:/Users/ETTINA03/NYU Langone Health Dropbox/April Jauhal/Shenhav_Lab/Databases/Tissue_Atlas/Secretome/sa_location_Secreted_to_ECM.tsv") %>% pull(Gene)
Tissue_atlas = read.delim("C://Users/ETTINA03/NYU Langone Health Dropbox/April Jauhal/Shenhav_Lab/MOMI/Metabolomics_working_dir/Data/Tissue_Atlas/rna_single_cell_type.tsv")

# Function to calculate proteomics correlation datasets for enrichment analysis and tabulation 
get_proteomics_cor_lists = function(Misame_proteome_input, Vital_proteome_input, Feat) {
  res_list = list()
  misame_protein_rcorr_Feat = Misame_proteome_input %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>%
    dplyr::select(Feat, colnames(misame_proteomics_filt), -SampleID) %>%
    as.matrix() %>% rcorr(type = 'spearman')
  
  misame_Feat_proteomics_assoc <- 
    inner_join(misame_protein_rcorr_Feat$r %>% as.data.frame() %>% dplyr::select(Feat) %>% 
               tibble::rownames_to_column("ProteinIds"),
    misame_protein_rcorr_Feat$P %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
      dplyr::rename(Feat = Feat) %>%
      mutate(p.adjust = p.adjust(Feat, method = "BH")) %>% filter(p.adjust<0.05) %>%
      dplyr::select(p.adjust) %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("ProteinIds")) %>%
    left_join(misame_protein_meta)
  
  res_list[['misame_pos_assoc']] = misame_Feat_proteomics_assoc %>% filter(!!sym(Feat)>0)
  res_list[['misame_neg_assoc']] = misame_Feat_proteomics_assoc %>% filter(!!sym(Feat)<0)
  
  vital_protein_rcorr_Feat = Vital_proteome_input %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>%
    dplyr::select(Feat, colnames(vital_proteomics_filt), -SampleID) %>%
    as.matrix() %>% rcorr(type = 'spearman')
  
  vital_Feat_proteomics_assoc <- 
    inner_join(vital_protein_rcorr_Feat$r %>% as.data.frame() %>% dplyr::select(Feat) %>% 
               tibble::rownames_to_column("ProteinIds"),
    vital_protein_rcorr_Feat$P %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
      dplyr::rename(Feat = Feat) %>%
      mutate(p.adjust = p.adjust(Feat, method = "BH")) %>% filter(p.adjust<0.05) %>%
      dplyr::select(p.adjust) %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("ProteinIds")) %>%
    left_join(vital_protein_meta)
  
  res_list[['vital_pos_assoc']] = vital_Feat_proteomics_assoc %>% filter(!!sym(Feat)>0)
  res_list[['vital_neg_assoc']] = vital_Feat_proteomics_assoc %>% filter(!!sym(Feat)<0)
  
  return(res_list)
}

# Function to compute proteomics enrichment for an given "interest_set" of protein names and metabolite label
calc_enrichment = function(label, interest_set, cor_df, source_prot_meta) {
  non_cor_df = source_prot_meta %>% filter(!ProteinIds %in% cor_df$Gene.Name)
  interest_ids = get(interest_set)
  interest_in_set = cor_df %>% filter(Gene.Name %in% interest_ids) %>% pull(Gene.Name) %>% unique()
  interest_notin_set = cor_df %>% filter(!Gene.Name %in% interest_in_set) %>% pull(Gene.Name) %>% unique()
  noninterest_in_set = non_cor_df %>% filter(Gene.Name %in% interest_ids) %>% pull(Gene.Name) %>% unique()
  noninterst_not_in_set = non_cor_df %>% filter(!Gene.Name %in% interest_in_set) %>% pull(Gene.Name) %>% unique()
  
  contingency = data.frame(matrix(c(length(interest_in_set), length(interest_notin_set),
                                    length(noninterest_in_set), length(noninterst_not_in_set)), nrow=2))
  p = chisq.test(contingency)$p.value
  interest_ratio = length(interest_in_set)/length(interest_notin_set)
  noninterest_ratio = length(noninterest_in_set)/length(noninterst_not_in_set)
  
  enrich_label = ifelse(interest_ratio > noninterest_ratio, "enrichment", "depletion")
  ratio_enrichment = interest_ratio / noninterest_ratio
  return(data.frame(Label = label, Category = interest_set, Enrichment=enrich_label, p=p, ratio_enrichment=ratio_enrichment))
}

# Wrapper function to calculate enrichments specified via 'params' using calc_enrichment
calc_all_enrichments <- function(cor_obj, label, params) {
  
  cor_list <- list(MISAME_pos = cor_obj[["misame_pos_assoc"]],
                   MISAME_neg = cor_obj[["misame_neg_assoc"]],
                   Mumta_pos  = cor_obj[["vital_pos_assoc"]],
                   Mumta_neg  = cor_obj[["vital_neg_assoc"]])
  
  meta_list <- list(MISAME = misame_protein_meta,
                  Mumta = vital_protein_meta)
  
  params %>%
    mutate(
      result = pmap(list(dataset, direction, gene_set),
                    function(dataset, direction, gene_set) {
                      calc_enrichment(
                        label = paste(label, dataset, direction),
                        interest_set = gene_set,
                        cor_df = cor_list[[paste0(dataset, "_", direction)]],
                        source_prot_meta = meta_list[[dataset]]
                      )
                    })
    ) %>% pull(result) %>% bind_rows() %>% 
    mutate(Study = word(Label, 2), Feat = word(Label, 1), Direction = word(Label, 3))
}


# Set key for metabolites in correlation/enrichment analysis
MG_heatmap_key = list("Sia"="Sialylated HMOs",
                        "Se"="Selenium",
                        "C5" = "Valerylcarnitine (C5)",
                        "C4" = "Butyrylcarnitine (C4)",
                        "C3" = "Propionylcarnitine (C3)",
                        "X6.SL" = "6'-Sialyllactose",
                        "Lys" = "Lysine")

# Compute: enrichment and correlation analysis for metabolites in MG_heatmap_key
params <- crossing(dataset = c("MISAME", "Mumta"),
                   direction = c("pos", "neg"),
                   gene_set = c("Breast_glandular_expr_genes", "Breast_myoepitheilal_expr_genes", 
                                "Immune_expr_genes", "IG_genes", "female_secrete_genes", 
                                "ECM_secrete_genes"))
prot_metab_cors = list()
prot_metab_enrichments = list()
for (metab in names(MG_heatmap_key)) {
  prot_metab_cors[[metab]] = get_proteomics_cor_lists(Misame_proteome_ready, Vital_proteome_ready, metab)
  prot_metab_enrichments[[metab]] = calc_all_enrichments(prot_metab_cors[[metab]], metab, params) 
}

# Tabulate highly correlated proteins per metabolite 
count_corrs = function(feature, cor_list) {
  res = bind_rows(
    data.frame(Feat = feature, Direction = "pos", Study = "MISAME", Count = cor_list$misame_pos_assoc %>% nrow()),
    data.frame(Feat = feature, Direction = "neg", Study = "MISAME", Count = cor_list$misame_neg_assoc %>% nrow()),
    data.frame(Feat = feature, Direction = "pos", Study = "Mumta-LW", Count = cor_list$vital_pos_assoc %>% nrow()),
    data.frame(Feat = feature, Direction = "neg", Study = "Mumta-LW", Count = cor_list$vital_neg_assoc %>% nrow()))
  return(res)
}

# Compile total correlation counts
corr_count_table <- bind_rows(
  count_corrs("Lysine", prot_metab_cors[["Lys"]]),
  count_corrs("Selenium", prot_metab_cors[["Se"]]),
  count_corrs("Siaylated HMOs", prot_metab_cors[["Sia"]]),
  count_corrs("6'-Sialyllactose", prot_metab_cors[["X6.SL"]]),
  count_corrs("Propionylcarnitine (C3)", prot_metab_cors[["C3"]]),
  count_corrs("Butyrylcarnitine (C4)", prot_metab_cors[["C4"]]),
  count_corrs("Valerylcarnitine (C5)", prot_metab_cors[["C5"]])
) %>%
  mutate(Feat = factor(Feat,
                       levels = rev(c("Valerylcarnitine (C5)", "Butyrylcarnitine (C4)",
                                      "Propionylcarnitine (C3)", "Lysine",
                                      "6'-Sialyllactose", "Siaylated HMOs", "Selenium"))))

# Combine enrichment data 
full_enrichments = bind_rows(prot_metab_enrichments[["Lys"]], prot_metab_enrichments[["Se"]], 
                             prot_metab_enrichments[["Se"]], prot_metab_enrichments[["C5"]], 
                             prot_metab_enrichments[["X6.SL"]], prot_metab_enrichments[["C4"]], 
                             prot_metab_enrichments[["C3"]])

# Compute breast glandular cell enrichment 
Glandular_enrich_df = full_enrichments %>% filter(Category=="Breast_glandular_expr_genes", Study %in% c("MISAME", "Mumta"), 
                                                  Direction=="neg") %>% 
  mutate(ratio_enrichment = ifelse(Enrichment=="depletion", NA, ratio_enrichment),,
         Study=ifelse(Study=="Mumta", "Mumta-LW", Study),
         Putative_biomarker = factor(unlist(MG_heatmap_key[Feat]), 
                                     levels = rev(c("Valerylcarnitine (C5)", "Butyrylcarnitine (C4)", "Propionylcarnitine (C3)",
                                                "Lysine", "6'-Sialyllactose", "Sialylated HMOs", "Selenium"))))
# plot breast glandular cell enrichment
Glandular_enrich_plot = Glandular_enrich_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=Putative_biomarker, x=log2(ratio_enrichment), fill = Study)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(),
           colour = "darkgray") +
           #colour = ifelse(Glandular_enrich_df$p < 0.05, "black", NA)) +
  geom_text(data = subset(Glandular_enrich_df, as.numeric(p) < 0.05) %>% filter(Study=="Mumta-LW"),
            aes(x = 0, 
                label = paste("p =", signif(as.numeric(p), 3)),
                vjust = 0.35, hjust = -0.1),
                position = position_nudge(y=0.2),
                color = "black") +
  geom_text(data = subset(Glandular_enrich_df, as.numeric(p) < 0.05) %>% filter(Study=="MISAME"),
            aes(x = 0, 
                label = paste("p =", signif(as.numeric(p), 3)),
                vjust = 0.35, hjust = -0.1),
                position = position_nudge(y=-0.25),
                color = "black") + geom_vline(xintercept=0) + theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        ) + 
  labs( fill = "Study") +
  xlab(expression(Log[2]*"(Enrichment)")) + ylab("Putative Biomarker \n (Negatively Associated Proteins)") + ggtitle("Breast Glandular \nCell-Enriched Proteins") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("MISAME" = "#A6CEE3", "Mumta-LW" = "#FFDBBB")) 

# Compute female secretion enrichment
female_secrete_enrich_df = full_enrichments %>% filter(Category=="female_secrete_genes", Study %in% c("MISAME", "Mumta"), 
                                                  Direction=="neg") %>% 
  mutate(ratio_enrichment = ifelse(Enrichment=="depletion", NA, ratio_enrichment),,
         Study=ifelse(Study=="Mumta", "Mumta-LW", Study),
         Putative_biomarker = factor(unlist(MG_heatmap_key[Feat]), 
                                     levels = rev(c("Valerylcarnitine (C5)", "Butyrylcarnitine (C4)", "Propionylcarnitine (C3)",
                                                "Lysine", "6'-Sialyllactose", "Sialylated HMOs", "Selenium"))))

# Plot female secretion enrichemnt
Female_secrete_enrich_plot = female_secrete_enrich_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=Putative_biomarker, x=log2(ratio_enrichment), fill = Study)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(),
           colour = "darkgray") +
  geom_text(data = subset(female_secrete_enrich_df, as.numeric(p) < 0.05) %>% filter(Study=="Mumta-LW"),
            aes(x = 0, 
                label = paste("p =", signif(as.numeric(p), 3)),
                vjust = 0.35, hjust = -0.1),
                position = position_nudge(y=0.2),
                color = "black") +
  geom_text(data = subset(female_secrete_enrich_df, as.numeric(p) < 0.05) %>% filter(Study=="MISAME"),
            aes(x = 0, 
                label = paste("p =", signif(as.numeric(p), 3)),
                vjust = 0.35, hjust = -0.1),
                position = position_nudge(y=-0.25),
                color = "black") + geom_vline(xintercept=0) + theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        ) + 
  labs( fill = "Study") +
  xlab(expression(Log[2]*"(Enrichment)")) + ylab("Putative Biomarker \n (Negatively Associated Proteins)") + ggtitle("Proteins Secreted To \nFemale Reproductive System") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("MISAME" = "#A6CEE3", "Mumta-LW" = "#FFDBBB"))

# Compute EC< enrichment
ecm_secrete_enrich_df = full_enrichments %>% filter(Category=="ECM_secrete_genes", Study %in% c("MISAME", "Mumta"), 
                                                  Direction=="pos") %>% 
  mutate(ratio_enrichment = ifelse(Enrichment=="depletion", NA, ratio_enrichment),
         Study=ifelse(Study=="Mumta", "Mumta-LW", Study),
         Putative_biomarker = factor(unlist(MG_heatmap_key[Feat]), 
                                     levels = rev(c("Valerylcarnitine (C5)", "Butyrylcarnitine (C4)", "Propionylcarnitine (C3)",
                                                "Lysine", "6'-Sialyllactose", "Sialylated HMOs", "Selenium"))))
# Plot ECM enrichment
ECM_secrete_enrich_plot = ecm_secrete_enrich_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=Putative_biomarker, x=log2(ratio_enrichment), fill = Study)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(),
           colour = "darkgray") +
  geom_text(data = subset(ecm_secrete_enrich_df, as.numeric(p) < 0.05) %>% filter(Study=="Mumta-LW"),
            aes(x = 0, 
                label = paste("p =", signif(as.numeric(p), 3)),
                vjust = 0.35, hjust = -0.1),
                position = position_nudge(y=0.2),
                color = "white") +
  geom_text(data = subset(ecm_secrete_enrich_df, as.numeric(p) < 0.05) %>% filter(Study=="MISAME"),
            aes(x = 0, 
                label = paste("p =", signif(as.numeric(p), 3)),
                vjust = 0.35, hjust = -0.1),
                position = position_nudge(y=-0.25),
                color = "white") + geom_vline(xintercept=0) + theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        ) + 
  labs( fill = "Study") +
  xlab(expression(Log[2]*"(Enrichment)")) + ylab("Putative Biomarker \n (Positively Associated Proteins)") + ggtitle("Proteins Secreted To ECM") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("MISAME" = "#1F78B4", "Mumta-LW" = "#ff8c00"))

# Compute immune cell enrichment
immune_expr_enrich_df = full_enrichments %>% filter(Category=="Immune_expr_genes", Study %in% c("MISAME", "Mumta"), 
                                                  Direction=="pos") %>% 
  mutate(ratio_enrichment = ifelse(Enrichment=="depletion", NA, ratio_enrichment),
         Study=ifelse(Study=="Mumta", "Mumta-LW", Study),
         Putative_biomarker = factor(unlist(MG_heatmap_key[Feat]), 
                                     levels = rev(c("Valerylcarnitine (C5)", "Butyrylcarnitine (C4)", "Propionylcarnitine (C3)",
                                                "Lysine", "6'-Sialyllactose", "Sialylated HMOs", "Selenium"))))

# Plot immune cell enrichment
Immune_expr_enrich_plot = immune_expr_enrich_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=Putative_biomarker, x=log2(ratio_enrichment), fill = Study)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(),
           colour = "darkgray") +
  geom_text(data = subset(immune_expr_enrich_df, as.numeric(p) < 0.05) %>% filter(Study=="Mumta-LW"),
            aes(x = 0, 
                label = paste("p =", signif(as.numeric(p), 3)),
                vjust = 0.35, hjust = -0.1),
                position = position_nudge(y=0.2),
                color = "white") +
  geom_text(data = subset(immune_expr_enrich_df, as.numeric(p) < 0.05) %>% filter(Study=="MISAME"),
            aes(x = 0, 
                label = paste("p =", signif(as.numeric(p), 3)),
                vjust = 0.35, hjust = -0.1),
                position = position_nudge(y=-0.25),
                color = "white") + geom_vline(xintercept=0) + theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        ) + 
  labs( fill = "Study") +
  xlab(expression(Log[2]*"(Enrichment)")) + ylab("Putative Biomarker \n (Positively Associated Proteins)") + ggtitle("Immune Cell-Enriched Proteins") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("MISAME" = "#1F78B4", "Mumta-LW" = "#ff8c00"))

# Calculate immunoglobin enrichment
Ig_enrich_df = full_enrichments %>% filter(Category=="IG_genes", Study %in% c("MISAME", "Mumta"), 
                                                  Direction=="pos") %>% 
  mutate(ratio_enrichment = ifelse(Enrichment=="depletion", NA, ratio_enrichment),
         Study=ifelse(Study=="Mumta", "Mumta-LW", Study),
         Putative_biomarker = factor(unlist(MG_heatmap_key[Feat]), 
                                     levels = rev(c("Valerylcarnitine (C5)", "Butyrylcarnitine (C4)", "Propionylcarnitine (C3)",
                                                "Lysine", "6'-Sialyllactose", "Sialylated HMOs", "Selenium"))))

# Plot immunoglobin enrichment
IG_enrich_plot = Ig_enrich_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=Putative_biomarker, x=log2(ratio_enrichment), fill = Study)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(),
           colour = "darkgray") +
  geom_text(data = subset(Ig_enrich_df, as.numeric(p) < 0.05) %>% filter(Study=="Mumta-LW"),
            aes(x = 0, 
                label = paste("p =", signif(as.numeric(p), 3)),
                vjust = 0.35, hjust = -0.1),
                position = position_nudge(y=0.2),
                color = "white") +
  geom_text(data = subset(Ig_enrich_df, as.numeric(p) < 0.05) %>% filter(Study=="MISAME"),
            aes(x = 0, 
                label = paste("p =", signif(as.numeric(p), 3)),
                vjust = 0.35, hjust = -0.1),
                position = position_nudge(y=-0.25),
                color = "white") + geom_vline(xintercept=0) + theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        ) + 
  labs( fill = "Study") +
  xlab(expression(Log[2]*"(Enrichment)")) + ylab("Putative Biomarker \n (Positively Associated Proteins)") + ggtitle("Immunoglobulin Proteins") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("MISAME" = "#1F78B4", "Mumta-LW" = "#ff8c00"))

# Combine Enrichment plots
Enrich_plots = ggarrange(Glandular_enrich_plot, Female_secrete_enrich_plot, ECM_secrete_enrich_plot, Immune_expr_enrich_plot, IG_enrich_plot, nrow = 1)

# Plot negative correlation count data 
neg_corr_count_df = corr_count_table %>% filter(Direction=="neg") %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=Feat, x=Count, fill = Study)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(),
           colour = "darkgray") +
           #colour = ifelse(Glandular_enrich_df$p < 0.05, "black", NA)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        ) + 
  labs( fill = "Study") +
  xlab("Total proteins") + ylab("Putative Biomarker \n (Negatively Associated Proteins)") + ggtitle("Significant Negative Protein Associations\n") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("MISAME" = "#A6CEE3", "Mumta-LW" = "#FFDBBB")) 

# Plot positive correlation count data
pos_corr_count_df = corr_count_table %>% filter(Direction=="pos") %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=Feat, x=Count, fill = Study)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(),
           colour = "darkgray") +
           #colour = ifelse(Glandular_enrich_df$p < 0.05, "black", NA)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        ) + 
  labs( fill = "Study") +
  xlab("Total proteins") + ylab("Putative Biomarker \n (Positively Associated Proteins)") + ggtitle("Significant Negative Protein Associations") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("MISAME" = "#1F78B4", "Mumta-LW" = "#ff8c00")) 

Figure5A1 = ggarrange(pos_corr_count_df, ECM_secrete_enrich_plot, Immune_expr_enrich_plot, IG_enrich_plot, nrow = 1)
Figure5A2 = ggarrange(neg_corr_count_df, Glandular_enrich_plot, Female_secrete_enrich_plot, nrow = 1)

Figure5A1
Figure5A2

ggexport(filename = paste0(fig_path, "/Figure5A1.pdf"), 
         plot = Figure5A1,
        width = 23.04, height = 4.5)
ggexport(filename = paste0(fig_path, "/Figure5A2.pdf"), 
         plot = Figure5A2,
        width = 19.25, height = 4.5)
```

## Figure 5B
``` {r}
# protein key 
Protein_key_Misame = list("AGRN" = "Agrin",
                   "IgA" = "IgA",
                   "COL4A2" = "Collagen",
                   "TNC" = "Tenascin C",
                   "PLOD3" = "Lysyl Hydroxylase 3",
                   "Calprotectin" = "Calprotectin",
                   "LALBA" = "α-Lactalbumin",
                   "CSN3" ="κ-casein",
                   "CSN1S1" = "α-S1-casein",
                   "CSN2"="β-Casein",
                   "H1" = "Hexose (Lactose)"
                   )
Protein_key_Vital = list("AGRN" = "Agrin",
                   "IgA" = "IgA",
                   "COL3A1" = "Collagen",
                   "TNC" = "Tenascin C",
                   "PLOD3" = "Lysyl Hydroxylase 3",
                   "Calprotectin" = "Calprotectin",
                   "LALBA" = "α-Lactalbumin",
                   "CSN3" ="κ-casein",
                   "CSN1S1" = "α-S1-casein",
                   "CSN2"="β-Casein",
                   "H1" = "Hexose (Lactose)")

# Defining components to use for heatmap generation
ECM_components = c('TNC', 'AGRN', 'PLOD3', 'COL4A2', 'COL3A1')
main_metab = c('C3', 'C4', 'C5', 'Lys', 'Sia', 'X6.SL', 'Se')
immune_factors = c("Calprotectin", "IgA")
mis_milk_focus_genes = misame_protein_meta %>% 
  filter(Gene.Name %in% Breast_glandular_expr_genes & Gene.Name %in% female_secrete_genes) %>% pull(Gene.Name) %>% sort()
vit_milk_focus_genes = vital_protein_meta %>% 
  filter(Gene.Name %in% Breast_glandular_expr_genes & Gene.Name %in% female_secrete_genes) %>% pull(Gene.Name) %>% sort()
mis_IG_focus_genes = IG_genes[IG_genes %in% colnames(misame_proteomics_filt_genes)]
vit_IG_focus_genes = IG_genes[IG_genes %in% colnames(vital_proteomics_filt_genes)]

# Generating heatmap contents
labels <- c("Misame", "Vital")
contexts <- c("Milk", "ECM")
focus_genes_map <- list(
  Milk = list(mis = mis_milk_focus_genes, vit = vit_milk_focus_genes),
  ECM  = list(mis = ECM_components, vit = ECM_components),
  immune = list(mis = immune_factors, vit=immune_factors),
  IG  = list(mis = mis_IG_focus_genes, vit = vit_IG_focus_genes)
)

heat_list <- list()
for (label in labels) {
  for (context in contexts) {
    focus_genes <- focus_genes_map[[context]][[tolower(substr(label, 1, 3))]]
    heat_list[[paste(label, context)]] <- get_heatmap_correlations(
      metab_feats = main_metab,
      focus_genes = focus_genes,
      label = label,
      include_H1 = (context == "Milk")
    )
  }
}

# Generating combined heatmaps 
MG_heatmap_key = list("Sia"="Sialylated HMOs",
                        "Se"="Selenium",
                        "C5" = "Valerylcarnitine (C5)",
                        "C4" = "Butyrylcarnitine (C4)",
                        "C3" = "Propionylcarnitine (C3)",
                        "X6.SL" = "6'-Sialyllactose",
                        "Lys" = "Lysine")
metab_feats = names(MG_heatmap_key)

Misame_matrix <- prepare_complete_heatmap_matrix(
  label = "Misame",
  heat_list = heat_list,
  Protein_key = Protein_key_Misame,
  proteomics_df = misame_proteomics_filt_genes,
  everything_df = Misame_everything,
  MSD_df = Mis_MSD,
  complex = TRUE
)

Misame_MG_Heatmap <- render_heatmap(
  matrix_r = Misame_matrix$r,
  matrix_p = Misame_matrix$p,
  title = "MISAME",
  colors = colorRamp2(seq(-1, 1, length.out = 100), colorRampPalette(c("purple", "white", "forestgreen"))(100))
)

Vital_matrix <- prepare_complete_heatmap_matrix(
  label = "Vital",
  heat_list = heat_list,
  Protein_key = Protein_key_Vital,               
  proteomics_df = vital_proteomics_filt_genes,    
  everything_df = Vital_everything,              
  MSD_df = Vit_MSD,                    
  complex = TRUE                         
)

Vital_MG_Heatmap <- render_heatmap(
  matrix_r = Vital_matrix$r,                      
  matrix_p = Vital_matrix$p,                     
  title = "VITAL",                                
  colors = colorRamp2(seq(-1, 1, length.out = 100), colorRampPalette(c("purple", "white", "forestgreen"))(100))
)

Figure5B = ggarrange(as.ggplot(Misame_MG_Heatmap), as.ggplot(Vital_MG_Heatmap), common.legend = TRUE)
Figure5B
ggexport(MG_heatmap1, filename=paste0(fig_path, "/Figure5B.pdf"),
         width=9, height=4.5)
```

## Figure 5C

``` {r}
# Function to generate protein-protein correlation data
get_protein_protein_correlations <- function(label, data_map, Protein_key, main_metab, other_genes) {
  
  # Create correlation matrix
  chosen_data <- data_map[[label]]
  cor_matrix <- chosen_data$data %>%
    left_join(chosen_data$other_genes) %>%
    left_join(chosen_data$MSD_data) %>%
    mutate(
      IgA = ifelse(IgA == "Low Signal", NA, as.numeric(IgA)),
      Insulin = ifelse(Insulin == "Low Signal", NA, as.numeric(Insulin)),
      Leptin = ifelse(Leptin == "Low Signal", NA, as.numeric(Leptin)),
      Calprotectin = ifelse(Calprotectin == "Low Signal", NA, as.numeric(Calprotectin))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(SampleID, metab_feats, IgA, Calprotectin, other_genes, H1) %>%
    mutate_all(~ str_remove_all(., " ")) %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>%
    as.matrix() %>%
    rcorr(type = "spearman")
  
  # Extract correlation and p-value matrices
  corr_matrix_r <- cor_matrix$r %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    dplyr::select(-main_metab) %>%
    filter(!rownames(cor_matrix$r) %in% main_metab) %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("Protein") %>%
    convert_proteins_heatmap(Protein_key)
  
  corr_matrix_p <- cor_matrix$P %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    dplyr::select(-main_metab) %>%
    filter(!rownames(cor_matrix$P) %in% main_metab) %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("Protein") %>%
    convert_proteins_heatmap(Protein_key)
  
  # Rename rows and columns
  colnames(corr_matrix_r) <- Protein_key[colnames(corr_matrix_r)]
  colnames(corr_matrix_p) <- Protein_key[colnames(corr_matrix_p)]
  
  corr_matrix_ordered_r <- corr_matrix_r[as.vector(unlist(Protein_key)), as.vector(unlist(Protein_key))]
  corr_matrix_ordered_p <- corr_matrix_p[as.vector(unlist(Protein_key)), as.vector(unlist(Protein_key))]
  
  return(list(r = corr_matrix_ordered_r, p = corr_matrix_ordered_p))
}
# Function to render protein-protein correlation heatmaps
render_protein_heatmap <- function(corr_matrix_r, corr_matrix_p, title, colors) {
  Heatmap(corr_matrix_r,
    cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
      if (is.na(corr_matrix_p[i, j]) | corr_matrix_p[i, j] < 0.05) {
        grid.text(if (corr_matrix_r[i, j] == 0) "" else sprintf("%.2f", corr_matrix_r[i, j]), x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 8))
      } else {
        grid.text("ns", x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 8))
      }
    },
    column_title = title,
    name = "Rho",
    cluster_columns = FALSE,
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    column_names_rot = -45,
    col = colors
  )
}

# Define protein data for heatmap
misame_milk_ecm_prots = c(mis_milk_focus_genes, ECM_components[ECM_components %in% colnames(misame_proteomics_filt_genes)])
Mis_milk_ecm_df = misame_proteomics_filt_genes %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% filter(SampleID %in% Misame_everything$SampleID) %>%
  dplyr::select(SampleID, misame_milk_ecm_prots) 

vital_milk_ecm_prots = c(vit_milk_focus_genes, ECM_components[ECM_components %in% colnames(vital_proteomics_filt_genes)])
Vit_milk_ecm_df = vital_proteomics_filt_genes %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% filter(SampleID %in% Vital_everything$SampleID) %>%
  dplyr::select(SampleID, vital_milk_ecm_prots) 

# Dataset-specific maps for MISAME and VITAL
data_map <- list(
  Misame = list(
    data = Misame_everything,
    other_genes = Mis_milk_ecm_df,
    MSD_data = Mis_MSD
  ),
  Vital = list(
    data = Vital_everything,
    other_genes = Vit_milk_ecm_df,
    MSD_data = Vit_MSD
  )
)



# Generate MISAME matrix
misame_correlations <- get_protein_protein_correlations(
  label = "Misame",
  data_map = data_map,
  Protein_key = Protein_key_Misame,
  main_metab = main_metab,
  other_genes = misame_milk_ecm_prots
)

# Render MISAME heatmap
Misame_protein_heatmap <- render_protein_heatmap(
  corr_matrix_r = misame_correlations$r,
  corr_matrix_p = misame_correlations$p,
  title = "MISAME",
  colors = colorRamp2(seq(-1, 1, length.out = 100), colorRampPalette(c("purple", "white", "forestgreen"))(100))
)

# Generate VITAL matrix
vital_correlations <- get_protein_protein_correlations(
  label = "Vital",
  data_map = data_map,
  Protein_key = Protein_key_Vital,
  main_metab = main_metab,
  other_genes = vital_milk_ecm_prots
)

# Render VITAL heatmap
Vital_protein_heatmap <- render_protein_heatmap(
  corr_matrix_r = vital_correlations$r,
  corr_matrix_p = vital_correlations$p,
  title = "VITAL",
  colors = colorRamp2(seq(-1, 1, length.out = 100), colorRampPalette(c("purple", "white", "forestgreen"))(100))
)

Figure5C = ggarrange(as.ggplot(Misame_protein_heatmap), 
                        as.ggplot(Vital_protein_heatmap), common.legend = TRUE)
Figure5C

ggexport(Figure5C, filename=paste0(fig_path, "/Figure5C.pdf"),
         width=10.8, height=4.8)
```
